description:
AWS Postgres (Aurora Serverless v2) registration data: the handles by which a
setup-created Aurora cluster is registered as a Frozen Postgres resource. Setup owns
the cluster, Alien refreshes and heartbeats it. Carries the master password's Secrets
Manager ARN, never the password.

instanceIdentifier.description: Writer instance identifier within the cluster.

passwordSecretArn.description: Secrets Manager ARN of the master password (never the password itself).

securityGroupId.description: Dedicated security group admitting 5432 from the stack security group.

subnetGroupName.description: DB subnet group spanning the private subnets.
